MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JOANNA KOZUBAL, TEL. NO. 864-6962 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR ATTY. BRENDA KEITH FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS HEAVEN, L L C A CALIFORNIA LIMITED COMPANY, MICHAEL SCOTT AND CENTER FOR WELLNESS & BEAUTY, INCORPORATED'S MOTION For Enforcement Of Settlement And Request For Sanctions, THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION TO ENFORCE THE ALLEGED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WHICH DOES NOT CONSTITUTE AN ENFORCEABLE SETTLEMENT. THE DOCUMENT ATTACHED TO THE UNTABBED EXHIBIT NUMBER 1, DECLARATION OF JOSHUA A. RIDLESS, DATED MARCH 11, 2009, ENTITLED "SETTLEMENT OFFER" (EMPHASIS ADDED) CONTAINS A SIGNATURE BY MICHAEL SCOTT, ONE BY JOSHUA A. RIDLESS, AND TOO ILLEGIBLE, UNIDENTIFIED INITIALS OR SIGNATURES. AN "OFFER" CAN BE AN AGREEMENT IF SIGNED BUT WHETHER IT WAS EXECUTED REMAINS INADEQUATELY SHOWN. MOREOVER, THE MAY 1, 2009 E-MAIL BY "JOSH" (EXHIBIT NUMBER2) DECLARATION OF BRENDA CRUZ KEITH, ACKNOWLEDGES THE PARTIES DISPUTE THE BINDING NATURE OF THE INITIALLY SIGNED DOCUMENT. 2) THE MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Quentin Kopp, Reporter: Scott Hughes, CSR # 12365 =301/QK/ER
